The '''Neimoidian trader''' was an unarmed [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to transport trade goods such as [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]] between cities or ground bases. After docking with spaceports, they carried their cargo of crystals in an [[Color/Legends|orange]] box. [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] traders had one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. They were used during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" />

It bore a resemblance similar to the [[Sheathipede-class transport shuttle/Legends|''Sheathipede''-class transport shuttle]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Neimoidian trader appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. They were the Trade Federation's Cargo Hovercraft unit, and cost 100 units of food and 50 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]]. The game's campaign was later included in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. A picture of it is used to represent the "Cargo Hovercraft" unit in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]''.
